system_prompt:
You are an expert web analyst specializing in SEO, conversion optimization, 
content clarity, and UX for marketing websites. 

You will receive structured metrics extracted from a webpage along with a preview of its content.
Your job is to produce a grounded, specific analysis — not generic advice.
Every insight and recommendation MUST reference the actual numbers from the metrics provided.

You must respond ONLY with valid JSON in exactly this structure:
{
  "insights": {
    "seo_structure": "string",
    "messaging_clarity": "string",
    "cta_usage": "string",
    "content_depth": "string",
    "ux_concerns": "string"
  },
  "recommendations": [
    {
      "priority": 1,
      "title": "string",
      "reasoning": "string"
    }
  ]
}

Rules:
- insights: each field is 2-4 sentences, specific to the metrics
- recommendations: exactly 4 items, ordered by priority (1 = highest)
- reasoning in each recommendation must cite at least one metric value
- Do not include markdown, backticks, or any text outside the JSON
user_prompt:

- Word count: 366
- H1 tags: 1
- H2 tags: 0
- H3 tags: 3
- CTA count: 11
- Internal links: 1
- External links: 48
- Total images: 72
- Images missing alt text: 70
- Meta title: "BURGER KING"
- Meta description: ""

PAGE CONTENT PREVIEW (first 3000 words):

Kandy Rd, Kiribathgoda Ja-Ela 150, Negombo Rd, Ja-Ela Rajagiriya Sri Jayawardenepura, Kotte Kurunegala Colombo Rd, Kurunegala Arcade Independence Square Independence Arcade, Bauddhaloka Mawatha, Colombo 00700 Kandy City Center Level 4, Kandy City Center, Sri Dalada Veediya, Kandy Peradeniya Rd, Kandy 619, Peradeniya Rd, Kandy 20000 Colombo 1 (Behind Dutch Hospital) Old Dutch Hospital Complex, Hospital St, Colombo 00100 Maharagama 108A, Avissawella Rd, Maharagama 10280 Kotahena George R D Silva Mw, Kotahena, Colombo 13 Level LG, One Galle Face Mall Level LG, One Galle Face Mall, Colombo 00200 Central Hospital Level 3, Central Hospital, Norris Canal Rd, Colombo Kottawa 328/1, Highlevel Road, Makumbura, Pannipitiya More Locations Dial the Hungry Line ! 0112 123 123 www.facebook.com/burgerkingsl www.instagram.com/burgerkingsl Burger King Sri Lanka Dial the Hungry Line ! 0112 123 123

Return only the JSON object as specified.

insights.seo_structure: The page's SEO structure is significantly underdeveloped with a generic meta title "BURGER KING" and a completely missing meta description, failing to leverage crucial search engine signals. The absence of H2 tags and only 3 H3 tags, coupled with a low word count of 366, indicates a lack of content hierarchy and depth for search engine crawlers to understand the page's main topics beyond basic brand recognition.
insights.messaging_clarity: While prominent display of delivery numbers aids immediate action, the page lacks clear, benefit-driven messaging about the menu or brand value, opting instead for extensive lists of locations. With only 366 words, the content is heavily skewed towards transactional information rather than engaging the user with product details or unique selling propositions.
insights.cta_usage: The high presence of 11 CTAs on a page with a minimal word count of 366 suggests a potential for choice paralysis or a lack of clear primary conversion path for users. Coupled with only 1 internal link, these numerous CTAs may not effectively guide users to explore deeper into the site or provide sufficient context for their actions.
insights.content_depth: The page exhibits shallow content depth, evidenced by a very low word count of 366 words, which is primarily dedicated to listing various store locations and delivery numbers. There's a notable absence of descriptive text, product details, or unique selling propositions for menu items, limiting both user engagement and potential for long-tail keyword targeting.
insights.ux_concerns: A significant UX concern is the accessibility and SEO impact of 70 images missing alt text out of 72 total images, which hinders screen readers and visual impairment users while also impacting search engine image indexing. Furthermore, the high number of external links (48) compared to a single internal link suggests potential navigation issues, possibly directing users off the site too frequently without providing sufficient internal exploration opportunities.

recommendations.title: Enhance On-Page SEO Fundamentals
recommendations.reasoning: The current meta title is a generic "BURGER KING" and the meta description is entirely missing, severely limiting the page's visibility and organic CTR, especially given the low word count of 366 which needs all other SEO signals to be strong.

recommendations.title: Improve Accessibility and Image SEO
recommendations.reasoning: 70 out of 72 images lacking alt text creates significant accessibility barriers for users with screen readers and severely handicaps image search SEO, missing a key opportunity for discovery and engagement.

recommendations.title: Restructure Content Hierarchy and Expand Depth
recommendations.reasoning: The page currently has 0 H2 tags and a low word count of 366, which limits content clarity for users and makes it difficult for search engines to understand the page's key topics, thus hindering discovery.

recommendations.title: Refine CTA Strategy and Internal Linking
recommendations.reasoning: With 11 CTAs on a page of only 366 words and only 1 internal link, users may experience decision fatigue or struggle to navigate deeper into the site, hindering conversion funnels and site exploration.
